steps.name: Given user goes to "electronics-on-emis" page of "BFLHome" website
When user plays the first reel
Then user verifies BFLElectronics player functions Play,MuteReel,SeekToEndInReel,SwipeUp,SwipeDown,SwipeUp,CloseFabReel using player "kPlayer0" with next player "kPlayer1"
